docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANEL, RIGOBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO, ANDRES ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
